expectations.description: Output correctly identifies that no baseline exists
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states '缺少 baseline trace' and '没有 baseline'

expectations.description: Output warns that effectiveness cannot be proven without before/after comparison
expectations.evidence: Output states '无法进行比较。缺少 baseline trace，缺少 variant trace，缺少 before/after 对照样本'

expectations.description: Output contains 'next_action' field with suggestion to collect baseline samples
expectations.evidence: next_action field is present and explicitly suggests collecting baseline and variant samples, comparing outputs, and recording traces

expectations.description: Output contains a structured eval record
expectations.evidence: Output is a well-structured JSON record with all required fields: eval_id, scenario, task_goal, variable_under_test, variable_type, baseline, variant, trace_refs, evidence_refs, scores, comparison, finding, decision, next_action
